rules.rule: every continuity scan MUST cite manual_id and package_id.
procedural continuity gaps (semantic-procedure step_index gaps) BLOCK approval.
warning continuity gaps (semantic-warning-group missing severity coverage) BLOCK approval.
grounding continuity gaps (orphan grounding_ids) BLOCK approval.
troubleshooting continuity gaps (missing escalation paths in semantic-troubleshooting-group) BLOCK approval.
unresolved semantic gaps are reported but reviewer may flag for re-extraction.
orphan semantic sections (cited in semantic_structure but not registered) BLOCK approval.
